messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Delete a done ticket's topic — only ever after its content is VERIFIED serialised into the repo
What it solves: THE PROBLEM. Every BL ticket gets a Telegram topic, and completed tickets' topics are already
closed automatically (BL-299, summary-then-close on TaskCompleted). But TELEGRAM DOES NOT HIDE
CLOSED TOPICS — close LOCKS a topic, it does not remove it from the list. So the list grows
without bound: 21 …
How it works: A topic is only deleted once its record is verified

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-331 - Delete a done ticket's topic — only ever after its content is VERIFIED serialised into the repo is complete.
